title: MCLN EX89 - Ecom Document printing and Gel Pack Logic Configuration Guide v.3

center 83548 390525 313690 EX 89 – Ecom Document P rinting and Gel Pack Logic Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 89 – Ecom Document P rinting and Gel Pack Logic Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \z \u \h 1. GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP PAGEREF _Toc210657258 \h 3 1.1. Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc210657259 \h 3 2. Add additional custom codes. PAGEREF _Toc210657260 \h 5 2.1. C-000-EX89 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc210657261 \h 5 2.2. Add Custom Code C-89R PAGEREF _Toc210657262 \h 6 2.3. Add Custom Code C-89W PAGEREF _Toc210657263 \h 7 2.4. Add Custom Code C-89P PAGEREF _Toc210657264 \h 9 2.5. Add Custom Code C-89S PAGEREF _Toc210657265 \h 11 2.6. Add Custom Code C-89T PAGEREF _Toc210657266 \h 12 2.7. Add Custom Code C-89U PAGEREF _Toc210657267 \h 13 2.8. Add Custom Code C-89G PAGEREF _Toc210657268 \h 15 2.9. Add Custom Code C-89D PAGEREF _Toc210657269 \h 18 3. Add EX89 Transaction Parameters PAGEREF _Toc210657270 \h 19 3.1. RF Print OB Docs Transaction Parameters PAGEREF _Toc210657271 \h 19 3.2. Add EX89 Prt OB Docs Transactions PAGEREF _Toc210657272 \h 21 4. Add EX89 Transactions to RF Menu PAGEREF _Toc210657273 \h 25 5. Other Required Enablements PAGEREF _Toc210657274 \h 26 5.1. Client ID/ Client Secret PAGEREF _Toc210657275 \h 26 5.2. Facilities WHSE OB LPN Weight Tolerance PAGEREF _Toc210657276 \h 26 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETU P Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. C lick ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab . 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additional custom codes. 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000-EX89 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under th e Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX 89 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click Save Add Custom Code C- 89R Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * Ecom REST call Document Request Indicator * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code Description and Code ID description- * Request All Documents * Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Repeat steps 6-9 for the following 4 Code ID’s Add Custom Code C- 89W Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * Ecom Ship Via Weight Limit * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code Description and Code ID description- * ECOM Ship Via Weight Limit * Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen  System Code P arameters Screen is displayed.  Click ADD button.   Populate the following information provided above.  Click SAVE.  Click on the Parameters tab.  Enter numeric value in Value edit box . Click Save Click the details tab and repeat steps 6-1 7 for the following Code ID, and Parameter Value Add Custom Code C- 89 P Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * Ecom Printer Setup * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code ID description- *Document Print Requestor* Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen  System Code parameters Screen is displayed.  Click ADD button.   Populate the following information provided above.  Click SAVE.  Click on the Parameters tab.  Enter print requestor in Value edit box . Click Save Repeat steps 6-17 for the following Code ID’s and Parameter values Add Custom Code C- 89 S Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * States for Tobacco/Cig sticker * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code ID description- * AK's Tobacco/Cig Stickers* Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Repeat steps 6-8 to add the following Code ID’s Add Custom Code C- 89T Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * Tobacco/Cig Product Types * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code ID description- * (TOBACCO) CIWD * Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Repeat steps 6-8 to add the following Code ID’s Add Custom Code C- 89U Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * Ecom Rest Call URL * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code ID description- * Gel Pack API URL * Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen  System Code parameters Screen is displayed.  Click ADD button.   Populate the following information provided above.  Click SAVE.  Click on the Parameters tab.  Enter URL in Value edit box . NOTE: Value - *https://apim-test.mclaneco.com/ecomm-warehouse-exp/v1/gelpacks/* Click Save Repeat steps 6-17 for the following Code ID and Parameter value NOTE: Value - *https://apim-test.mclaneco.com/ecomm-warehouse-exp/v1/ship/box/* Add Custom Code C- 89G Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * Ecom Gel Pack Info * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code ID description- *24 oz Gel Pack* Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen  System Code parameters Screen is displayed.  Click ADD button.   Populate the following information provided above.  Click SAVE.  Repeat steps 10-14 for the following Parameter Click on the Parameters tab.  Enter parameter values as shown below Click Save Repeat steps 6- 18 for the following Code ID ’s and Parameter value s Add Custom Code C-89 D Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- * EX89 PDF Path * Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen  System Code parameters Screen is displayed.  Click ADD button.   Populate the following information provided above.  Click SAVE.  Click C ode IDs Click the parameters tab **This is an example- do not use the file path above Configure file path Click Save Add EX89 Transaction Parameters RF Print OB Docs Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “ Prt OB Docs ”.   Click on “ Prt OB Docs ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right.  Click “Add”  Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below.  NOTE: D escription- * EX89 ECOM Print Enablement * Hit “Save”  Repeat steps 3-5 for the following parameter Back out of the Program Template screen and click the parameters tab. Click “Edit” and check off Param 88-88 and select “Request All documents” from the 89-90 drop down Click Save Add EX89 Prt OB Docs Transactions Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “ Prt OB Docs ”.   Select Check box then select Copy Copy Details below Select Save Select newly created transaction and select Edit Select the print option Hazmat Select Save Repeat steps 2-7 for the following transactions Prt OB Docs Shipping Label Prt OB Docs Invoice Prt OB Docs Packing List Add EX89 Transactions to RF Menu Navigate to RF Menu Maint enance UI Filter for Prt OB Docs transaction Select folder dropdowns root RF Menu Outbound Drag and drop these transactions into the Outbound Select Save Other Required Enablements Client ID/ Client Secret Open the DB connection Run the following update command with the Client ID update application_configuration set value = 'Insert Client ID' where key = ' mcln.ex89.ecom .client_id '; commit; Run the following query to confirm changes select * from application_configuration where key = ' mcln.ex89.ecom .client_id'; Run the following update command with the Client Secret update application_configuration set value = 'Insert Client Secret' where key = ' mcln.ex89.ecom .client_secret '; commit; Run the following query to confirm changes select * from application_configuration where key = ' mcln.ex89.ecom .client_ secret '; Facilities WHSE OB LPN Weight Tolerance Open Facilities UI and select your facility Click Edit Click Warehouse Details at the bottom of the screen Click the Outbound tab Set desired LPN weight tolerance
